div1.entryFree: Prenzie or Prenzy, probably == too nice, precise, demure, prim: the p. Angelo, Meas. III, 1, 94. the damned'st body to invest and cover in p. guards, Meas. III, 1, 94 cf. Burns' Halloween: poor Willie, wi' his bowkail runt, was brunt wi' primsie Mallie. cf. also the modern prim, and the ancient Scotch prunse.
